domain_matrix.narrative: Technical Debt groups 22 low-trust or ephemeral tables. Collapse or defer these until core domains are stable.

Finance spans 10 tables across 1 schema(s). Relative business weight (from log activity) is high when importance is high; complexity reflects legacy Hebrew identifiers, cross-schema joins, and ephemeral objects.
